meta.title: Aurexon GmbH – Physical Commodity Trading · Vienna
meta.description: Aurexon GmbH conducts physical commodity trading on own account (proprietary trading) in Vienna, Austria. Metals, energy, agricultural products. Supplementary intermediation support on request.

intermediation.title: Intermediation Support
intermediation.subtitle: Confidential counterparty introductions for physical commodity transactions — no financial intermediation.
intermediation.legalWarning: Important legal notice: The intermediation support is a supplementary service (ancillary activity) and explicitly does
intermediation.legalHighlight: not constitute a financial service per BWG or WAG 2018
intermediation.legalEnd: . No custody of client funds, no investment advice, no operation of a trading venue.
intermediation.lead: Aurexon GmbH operates a dedicated intermediation support service as an ancillary activity for private buyers and sellers of physical commodities — with full NDA protection, verification of all parties and a personal closing meeting in Vienna.
intermediation.step1Desc: All submissions are received under a signed NDA under Austrian law.
intermediation.step2Desc: KYC/AML compliance, capacity verification and document review for all parties.
intermediation.step3Desc: Confidential matching of compatible counterparties — pure introduction, no financial intermediation.
intermediation.step4Desc: NCNDA, IMFPA, commission protection agreements under Austrian law for all parties involved.
intermediation.step5Desc: Personal closing meeting in Vienna with notary, legal counsel and interpreter on request.
intermediation.viennaDesc1: Aurexon GmbH organises and oversees the personal closing meeting between confirmed buyers and sellers in Vienna.
intermediation.viennaDesc2: Vienna offers a neutral, prestigious and legally robust jurisdiction for the signing of final transaction documents.
intermediation.vc1: Premium venue reservation in Vienna's 1st district (Innere Stadt)
intermediation.vc2: Certified Austrian notary for document authentication
intermediation.vc3: Accredited legal counsel from the Austrian Bar Association
intermediation.vc4: Professional translation services: DE / EN / ES and additional languages
intermediation.vc5: Secure document signing with certified original copies
intermediation.vc6: Bank coordination for simultaneous payment confirmation
intermediation.vc7: Post-closing compliance & archiving per UGB and GDPR
intermediation.formSubtitle: All submissions protected by signed NDA.

about.title: About Aurexon GmbH
about.p1: Headquartered in Vienna, Aurexon GmbH conducts physical commodity trading on own account under the business purpose "Trading in Goods of All Kinds" (Austrian Commercial Register). Operating under the Trade Act 1994 (GewO), Austrian commercial and company law (UGB, GmbHG).
about.p2: Vienna's unique position at the crossroads of Eastern and Western European trade makes it the ideal base for global commodity transactions. Austria's legal and banking infrastructure provides a robust, neutral framework.
about.p3: Our team combines decades of trading experience with legal, compliance and logistics expertise.
about.quote: "We exist to make complex commodity transactions simpler, safer and more transparent."
about.legalNote: Legal Status: Aurexon GmbH · Commercial Register Vienna · FN [Placeholder] · UID ATU [Placeholder] · WKO Member, Trade Division · No financial services per BWG or WAG 2018. Primary activity: Proprietary trading. Intermediation: Ancillary service.
about.panelBody: Proprietary trading in physical commodities · Supplementary intermediation on request · Vienna, Austria.
about.ctaNote: Ancillary service · No regulated financial service

contact.subtitle: Contact our Vienna office for commodity trading, intermediation support or general enquiries. All communications are treated confidentially.
